Review: This movie was an absolute disaster. From the very beginning, it felt like a complete waste of time. The plot was painfully slow and made no sense at all. The acting was terrible, with zero emotional connection, and the dialogues were cringe-worthy. The direction was confusing, and the editing made it even worse. I honestly regret watching this film. It’s one of the worst movies I’ve ever seen, and I would not recommend it to anyone under any circumstances.
